overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a survivor character running alongside a moving freight train through a foggy forest at dawn. The character navigates from railway tracks into dense vegetation, eventually approaching a camp with burning fires and wooden structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway track through misty pine forest

events.description: character veers right off the railway tracks into the undergrowth to avoid the approaching train

agents.ego_description: sprinting along railway tracks toward an approaching train before veering into the bushes on the right side

notable_agents.action: red locomotive approaching on the tracks with headlight glowing through the fog

entered.detail: metal rails with wooden ties surrounded by gravel ballast
large red diesel locomotive with illuminated headlight approaching through the mist
tall evergreen trees forming a dense wall along the left side of the tracks
tall evergreen trees forming a dense wall along the right side of the tracks
rocky gravel surface between and alongside the railway ties

segments.scene_description: The character runs along railway tracks through a misty pine forest, approaching a red locomotive in the distance. At around 4 seconds, the character veers off the gravel bed into the undergrowth on the right side, continuing to run parallel to the tracks as the train draws nearer.

events.description: train cars temporarily block view of the forest beyond as character runs alongside
character adjusts course to run closer to the passing train while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: sprinting through dense vegetation parallel to the moving freight train on the left

notable_agents.action: red freight train cars moving parallel to the character's path through the forest

entered.detail: red boxcars and freight cars of the moving train passing by on the tracks
tall grass and thick bushes alongside the dirt path
narrow dirt trail running parallel to the railway through the forest

segments.scene_description: Sprinting through dense vegetation alongside the railway, the character runs parallel to the moving freight train. The red train cars pass by on the left, temporarily blocking the view of the forest beyond, while the character navigates through tall grass and bushes on a narrow dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge approaching survivor camp with fires

events.description: character passes the train and emerges from dense forest toward a settlement with visible campfires
approaching warm orange light from campfires contrasts with the cool blue foggy environment

agents.ego_description: running past the train and approaching a camp with burning fires and wooden structures ahead

entered.detail: rustic wooden building with weathered planks situated near the camp
burning fires providing warm orange light in the foggy clearing ahead
derelict truck or car parked near the camp entrance
wooden power line pole with wires running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed the train, the character emerges from the dense forest toward a clearing with a survivor camp. Wooden structures and burning campfires become visible ahead, casting warm orange light against the cool foggy atmosphere, while abandoned vehicles and utility poles mark the edge of the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty railway corridor into a dense forest that eventually opens into a flickering survivor camp. It begins with the character running along gravel tracks through a foggy pine forest toward a distant red locomotive before veering off into the thick undergrowth. As the character sprints parallel to the tracks, the red freight cars slide past on the left, momentarily obscuring the woods while the path narrows through tall grass and bushes. The scene then shifts as the character emerges from the dense vegetation into a clearing, where the cool gray fog meets the warm orange glow of burning campfires. Finally, the camera moves toward a settlement of wooden structures, passing abandoned vehicles and utility poles that mark the edge of the camp.
